title: OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM - 211info
text: EUGENE OFFICE OREGON MONEY MANAGEMENT PROGRAM Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides payee services. 1015 Willamette Street Eugene, OR 97401 Eligibility: -Age 60 and older and enrolled with an ongoing Case Manager/Care Coordinator -Age 18 and older who have a documented disability and enrolled with an ongoing Case Manager/Care Coordinator Hours: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Email (541) 682-3353 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 682-3353 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake AREA SERVED: Lane County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 8am-5pm Services: Representative Payee Services Other Services Offered At This Location: COMMUNITY GROUPS AND GOVERNMENT/ADMINISTRATIVE OFFICES - AREA AGENCY ON AGING FOOD - HOME DELIVERED MEALS HEALTH SUPPORTIVE SERVICES - AGING AND DISABILITY RESOURCE CONNECTION INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - ADULT PROTECTIVE SERVICES INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OPTIONS COUNSELING INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE INDIVIDUAL AND FAMILY SUPPORT SERVICES - OREGON PROJECT INDEPENDENCE – MEDICAID INFORMATION SERVICES - FAMILY CAREGIVER SUPPORT PROGRAM PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - MEDICAID PUBLIC ASSISTANCE PROGRAMS - SNAP UTILITIES - SENIOR CONNECTIONS If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. EUGENE OFFICE
